name: cube
notes: run_app allocates engine, installs logger, runs to window close, frees on exit.
Builtin meshes (.CUBE, .SPHERE, .QUAD_XZ, .CONE, .CAPSULE, .CYLINDER, .TORUS) and colors are pre-baked at world.init.

name: animation_layering
desc: Bone-mask layer blending across multiple clips.
notes: Layer indices are returned by add_animation_layer; pick stable slots for "walk", "run", "upper-body".
BlendMode default .REPLACE (weighted). Use .ADD for additive layers (recoil over aim).
One-shot crossfade between layers: mjolnir.transition_to_animation.
Drive per-layer weight live with set_animation_layer_weight.

name: aoe
notes: Triggers don't generate contacts — overlap-test only.
physics.query_triggers_in_sphere for snapshots; engine.physics.trigger_overlaps for continuous events.
Mouse picking: camera_viewport_to_world_ray → physics.raycast_trigger. Multiply mouse by DPI on high-DPI displays.
hit.body_handle is a union — switch on the variant.

name: bullet_wall_ccd
desc: Fast projectiles don't tunnel through thin walls.
notes: No extra setup — engine keeps fast bodies from tunneling automatically.
Tune response via body.friction, body.restitution, body.linear_damping, body.angular_damping.
Set engine.physics.gravity = {0,0,0} in setup for pure ballistic tests.

name: cameras
notes: Engine defaults active_controller to orbit. Set engine.camera_controller_enabled = false in setup to write your own.
Controllers are stateful — call camera_controller_*_sync after warping the camera or swapping controllers.
Follow controller takes a ^[3]f32 target.

name: crowd_nav
desc: Detour crowd agents navigating a navmesh.
notes: Bake the navmesh once via mjolnir.setup_navmesh (tag walkable nodes with .ENVIRONMENT).
Per-frame: each agent queries find_path, walks the polyline, steers around neighbours.
Heavy bakes — do them at setup or after major scene changes only.

name: debug_draw
desc: Line-strip primitives and debug bone overlay.
notes: Toggle bone visualization via the debug overlay (engine.debug_ui_enabled = true).
Line-strip rendering is a regular material type — spawn a mesh node with line-strip material.

name: forcefield
desc: Vortex force field dragging particles around it.
notes: strength negative = repel, positive = attract. tangent_strength swirls.
Parent + child trick orbits the field around a point cheaply (rotate the parent).
Cap is MAX_FORCE_FIELDS = 32.

name: gltf_animation
notes: Animation names match animations[i].name. Empty names become Anim_0, Anim_1, …
play_animation adds to layer 0 with weight 1.0. Use add_animation_layer for multi-layer blends.
mjolnir.skinned_mesh(engine, root) grabs the first skinned child.

name: gltf_static
notes: mjolnir.load_gltf returns root nodes; children wire into the scene graph automatically.
Embedded textures upload via gpu.create_texture_2d_from_data; PBR maps (metallic, roughness, emissive) are picked up.
load_gltf blocks — wrap with core:thread for background loads.

name: grid
notes: One mesh + one material handle shared across 90k nodes — each draw is a u32 lookup on the GPU.
Big destroy/create swaps need a FRAMES_IN_FLIGHT gap so the staging pipeline can drain.

name: ik
notes: add_ik_layer_chain walks the skeleton from root to tip. add_ik_layer takes the bone list directly.
Pole vector controls the bending plane (knee/elbow direction).
weight = 0 disables IK without removing the layer.
anim.ik_constraints_uniform sets bend cones per joint.

name: input_demo
notes: Callbacks fire on the GLFW thread; engine.input mirrors the current state.
key_holding / mouse_holding are true only when pressed last frame AND this frame.

name: jump
desc: Character controller, movement are powered by physics engine.
notes: Character is a dynamic body with enable_rotation = false.
Jump = apply_impulse on grounded check (raycast down).
Lateral movement via body.velocity.xz; preserve velocity.y for gravity.

name: lights
notes: Color vector's w channel doubles as intensity.
cast_shadow = true allocates a 2D shadow map (SHADOW_MAP_SIZE = 512).
Point-light cubemap shadows need -define:REQUIRE_GEOMETRY_SHADER=true.
Mutate fields without a setter via the pointer, then mark_light_dirty.

name: material
notes: metallic / roughness drive the BRDF; scalar factors stack with optional textures.
base_color_factor tints the albedo map (multiplicative).

name: navmesh
notes: Custom geometry: accumulate with NavGeometryBuilder, then nav.build_navmesh.
"Bake everything tagged" flow: mjolnir.setup_navmesh reads tagged scene nodes.
Mouse-pick onto the navmesh: ray-test ground plane → mjolnir.find_nearest_point → mjolnir.find_path.
Heavy build — do it at setup or after big scene changes.

name: obj_loader
notes: load_obj takes a single material handle override; .mtl is ignored.
Vertex normals are computed if missing.

name: orthographic_camera
notes: Use camera_init_orthographic — pass ortho width/height instead of FOV.
Good for 2.5D, minimaps, isometric views, or shadow casters.

name: particles
notes: Emitter follows its node — translate the node, the source moves.
weight is gravity-like; negative floats particles up.
Simulated and compacted on the GPU. Cap is MAX_PARTICLES = 65536.
position_spread + velocity_spread randomize the burst cone.

name: path_modifier
desc: Procedural bone modifier following a spline.
notes: Path is a [][3]f32 — internally promoted to a Catmull-Rom spline.
Tune offset + speed per frame to scrub along the path.
loop = true repeats; otherwise the chain pins to the end.

name: pbr
notes: Ambient pass samples the loaded environment map + BRDF LUT.
Tune engine.render.post_process or the ambient renderer's ibl_intensity to balance IBL vs. direct light.

name: physics
notes: spawn_static / spawn_dynamic create node + body + visual child in one call. set_inertia_from_collider runs automatically.
Raw bodies without a node: mjolnir.create_static_body / create_dynamic_body.
engine.physics.gravity defaults to {0, -9.81, 0}. Set in setup for zero-g.
KILL_Y = -50.0 — bodies that fall below are killed.

name: post_process
desc: Bloom, DoF, fog, tonemap, outline, crosshatch.
notes: Effects run in insertion order. Conventional chain: fog → bloom → tonemap.
post_process.clear_effects + rebuild on settings change. No need to rebuild every frame.
Helper procs: add_outline, add_fog, add_dof, add_bloom, add_blur, add_crosshatch, add_grayscale, add_tonemap.

name: procedural_mesh
notes: Build a geometry.Geometry at runtime, hand it to mjolnir.create_mesh.
Tangents are auto-filled if missing.
For frequently regenerated meshes, set auto_purge = false to keep CPU geometry around.

name: render_to_texture
desc: Secondary camera rendered into a bindless texture.
notes: Skip POST_PROCESS / UI on non-main cameras to save GPU time.
get_camera_attachment returns a Texture2DHandle — sample it from any shader, not just UI.
Re-bind in post_render each frame so per-frame ping-pong picks the right attachment.

name: scene_graph
notes: spawn_child parents at creation; mjolnir.attach / detach rewire later.
Local transforms multiply through the chain — rotate a parent, all children orbit.
despawn is recursive.

name: spider_leg_modifier
desc: Procedural spider legs — IK + parabolic foot lift.
notes: One layer drives all legs; per-leg time_offset staggers the gait (tripod by default).
lift_height + lift_frequency + lift_duration shape the foot arc.
Read the solved foot target via get_spider_leg_target.

name: spline
notes: Catmull-Rom by default. spline_sample(s, t) with t in [0,1].
Build an arc-length table for uniform-speed traversal along the curve.

name: sprite
notes: frame_columns × frame_rows defines the sprite-sheet layout.
SpriteAnimation drives the current frame with fps, mode (ONCE / LOOP / PINGPONG).
Sprites billboard toward the active camera.

name: tail_modifier
notes: propagation_speed low ⇒ stiff tail; high ⇒ whippy.
damping controls how fast bones return to rest.
Tune live with set_tail_modifier_params — Maybe fields mean only values you pass get updated.

name: transparent
notes: Materials with type = .TRANSPARENT render in a separate additive pass.
Camera-distance sort happens automatically; tie-breaks are insertion order.

name: ui
desc: 2D UI widgets, layout, events, fontstash text.
notes: Coordinates are pixels, origin top-left.
Per-widget z_order; higher draws on top.
Hit-testing happens in update_input. Widgets receive HOVER_IN / HOVER_OUT / CLICK_DOWN / CLICK_UP automatically.
Stash a context pointer via ui.set_user_data; recover in handlers as event.user_data.

name: wireframe
notes: Set MATERIAL_WIREFRAME on the node flag, or use a wireframe material.
Useful for debug overlays; also bypasses the G-buffer.

name: snake
notes: Full game: input → grid sim → spawn/despawn nodes → score UI.
Game state lives on engine.user_data instead of file globals.

name: torus_tetris
notes: The board wraps around — pieces falling off one edge re-enter the opposite side.
Mixes UI text, dynamic spawn, and procedural mesh for the playfield.
